---
title: "Development Log Template"
---

Use this page (or a separate document) as evidence of your process.

## Sprint 1 (Weeks 1–2)

- **Goal:**
- **What I built:**
- **Problems I hit:**
- **How I fixed them:**

## Sprint 2 (Weeks 3–4)

- **Goal:**
- **What I built:**
- **Feedback received:**
- **Changes made:**

## Sprint 3 (Weeks 5–6)

- **Goal:**
- **Environmental data feature added:**
- **Test results:**
- **Changes made:**

## Sprint 4 (Weeks 7–8)

- **Goal:**
- **User/usability testing notes:**
- **Improvements made:**

## Final (Weeks 9–10)

- **Final checks completed:**
- **Publishing steps completed:**
- **How my evidence meets A/M/E:**
- **What I would improve next:**
